title: Map Rendering Disabler
description: Disables the rendering of filled maps, which can be useful for Twitch streamers who want to stream on servers with ToS violating map arts.
body:
## Description
This mod removes the renderer for maps. This results in all held and item-framed maps to stop displaying it's content. Maps will always render blank with this mod installed.

## Why?
On some server you may see maps that violate Twitch ToS, which could result in a Twitch ban.
